title: Capability claim without requirement backing
description: Add a capability claim in docs with no corresponding requirement

mutation.append:
## Token Bucket Scaling

The system validates token bucket capacity against configured burst limits before dispatching quorum requests. It prevents oversubscription by detecting when concurrent dispatches exceed the available token budget.
mutation.description: Add capability claim about token bucket scaling with no matching requirement

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect D->R gap for unsupported capability claim

title: Capability claim about quantum entanglement

The solver validates quantum entanglement coherence before dispatching results to the quorum. It ensures superposition states collapse correctly during multi-agent deliberation.
